title: Smart driver latency P50/P95/P99
description: Per-decision latency distribution split by driver path. Targets: P50<400ms, P95<1200ms, P99<1500ms (the SmartMonsterDriver hard deadline).
query_recipe: Phoenix UI → Project 'eldritch-latency' → Filter span_name='eldritch.monster.decision' → View latency histogram on attribute 'eldritch.latency_ms' grouped by 'eldritch.driver.path'. Targets: P50<400ms, P95<1200ms, P99<1500ms.
